sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka nun sung ka tatkhialhna tam zo a,
Kong honsa ka va zuan ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ahih hang Jesuh’n hong sap ciang inn sungah,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ama itna lakah kei a neu pen,
Thungetna ah zong a zawngkhal pen;
bang ke’n ka zuan mawk hi,
Amah in hong nial lo ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka mawhna Amah’n silkhia ding hi;
A tang kongpi lam zuan gige.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ka nunsung ka tatkhialhna tamzo a,
Ka kahna in khua mu lopi,
Hong Honpa’n hong tumsak ding hi.
